company_overview:
Kayfa Company Overview

This document provides Kayfa's company identity, mission, key features, and contact information for AI agent retrieval.

Company Identity

Kayfa is a leading Arabic educational platform developed by Kayfa Digital Solutions, accredited by the International Accreditation Organization (IAO).

Mission and Audience

Mission: Improve lives through learning and technology by equipping users with skills for in-demand digital jobs.

Target Audience:
- Students and recent graduates
- Working professionals and freelancers
- Anyone interested in IT and digital fields

Key Features

 -  Feature  -  Description  - 

 -  Learning Model  -  Self-paced, on-demand courses with no deadlines  - 
 -  Certification  -  Employer-recognized certificates upon completion  - 
 -  NGen Program  -  Technology education for students aged 8-18  - 

Contact Points

 -  Type  -  Detail  - 

 -  General Email  -  info@kayfa.io  - 
 -  Support Email  -  support@kayfa.io  - 
 -  U.A.E Phone  -  +971 55 387 7671  - 
 -  Egypt Phone  -  +201 05 502 3774  - 
 -  Syria Phone  -  +963 98 337 8448  - 

Physical Locations

- U.A.E (HQ): Business Center 1, M Floor, The Meydan Hotel, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai
- Egypt: 15 Al Lasilki, Infront of Maadi Technology Park, Maadi, Cairo
- Syria: Next to Day by Day Mall, West Al Mashtal, Hama

Sources

- https://kayfa.io/
- https://kayfa.io/about-us/
- https://kayfa.io/contact-us/
- https://kayfa.io/faqs/
- https://kayfa.io/terms-conditions/
faqs_and_rules:
Kayfa Policies and FAQs

This document covers Kayfa's subscription, refund, cancellation policies, and frequently asked questions.

Subscription Policy

 -  Topic  -  Policy  - 

 -  Term  -  Annual basis only, auto-renews unless canceled  - 
 -  Payment  -  Online via bank transaction or credit card  - 
 -  Pricing  -  Subject to change; may vary by country/currency  - 
 -  Cancellation  -  Cancel before next billing date; takes effect at cycle end  - 

Refund Policy

General
No refunds once subscription fees have been withdrawn.

Live/Onsite Courses
 -  Timing  -  Refund  - 

 -  7+ days before start  -  Full refund  - 
 -  Less than 7 days before  -  80% refund (20% admin fee)  - 
 -  After program started  -  No refund  - 

Recorded Courses
 -  Access Status  -  Refund  - 

 -  No content accessed  -  Full refund  - 
 -  Content accessed/downloaded  -  No refund  - 

Processing
Refunds issued to original payment method within 7-30 working days.

Course Replacement

Users can replace a course with one of equal or lower value before the course begins. Pay difference if replacement is higher value.

Frequently Asked Questions

 -  Question  -  Answer  - 

 -  What is Kayfa?  -  Educational platform offering high-quality courses to improve lives through learning and technology.  - 
 -  How do I access courses?  -  On-demand via desktop/laptop. Access via confirmation email link or "My Learning" page after login.  - 
 -  Are there deadlines?  -  No deadlines to begin or complete courses.  - 
 -  Can I preview courses?  -  Yes, some courses offer free previews.  - 
 -  Where can I get help?  -  Email support@kayfa.io  - 

Source

- https://kayfa.io/faqs/
- https://kayfa.io/terms-conditions/
privacy:
Kayfa Privacy Policy

This document summarizes the key aspects of Kayfa's Privacy Policy, focusing on data collection, usage, and user rights, optimized for AI agent retrieval.

Data Controller and Purpose

Kayfa is the data controller, responsible for deciding how personal information is collected, stored, and used [1]. The purpose of data collection is to provide services, communicate with users, troubleshoot issues, secure against fraud, improve services, analyze usage, serve personalized advertising, and comply with legal requirements [1].

Information Collected

The following personal data is collected upon account registration and use of services [1]:

*   Identity and Contact: Name, Email Address, Year of Birth, Gender, Country of Residence/Origin, Phone Numbers, Social Media Accounts (if used for login).
*   Usage Data: Records of visits to Kayfa and engagement with educational content (pages, videos, assessments, posts, comments, and other interactions).
*   Technical Data: Information collected through automated means like cookies and web beacons to enable site functionality, remember preferences, and secure the site [1].

User Rights

Users have several rights regarding their personal data [1]:

*   Right to Access: Request access to personal data held and information about its processing.
*   Right to Rectification: Request correction or update of inaccurate or incomplete information.
*   Right to Erasure: Request deletion of personal data in certain circumstances.
*   Right to Restrict Processing: Request restriction of processing under certain conditions.
*   Right to Object: Object to the processing of personal data (e.g., for direct marketing).

To exercise these rights, users should contact Kayfa at info@kayfa.io [1].

Source

[1] https://kayfa.io/privacy/ "Privacy Policy  -  Kayfa Platform"
